headline: What's Sprouts Farmers' Probability of an Earnings Beat This Season?
summary: Sprouts Farmers Market is set to report Q1 earnings soon as health-focused momentum meets softer traffic trends and potential margin pressure.

headline: Is Kroger (KR) Offering Value After Recent Pullback And High P/E Multiple
summary: If you are wondering whether Kroger at about US$65.90 is a bargain or already pricing in a lot of optimism, the answer depends on how you look at value and which yardsticks you use. The stock has had a mixed run, with a 2.9% decline over the last 7 days and a 10.0% pullback over 30 days, even though it sits 4.7% higher year to date and 42.9% and 96.1% higher over 3 and 5 years. Recent headlines around Kroger have focused on its position in the US grocery market and the ongoing attention on...
